title: Food Critic Tasting Notes
text:
## Food Critic Tasting Notes

Tonight's meal at {place} began with a {color} bowl of {food}.

The chef, {person}, described it as {adjective}, but I detected notes of {noun} and mild {emotion}.

Course two arrived by {vehicle} and contained {number} {plural noun} arranged like a {animal}.

The sauce {past-tense verb} across the plate while the waiter began {verb ending in -ing}.

Overall rating: {adjective}, provided you enjoy {verb} with your {body part} beside a {color} {object}.
